transcript: Speaker A: ज्याला English येत नाही त्याला native सारखं बोलायला किती वेळ लागतो? [How long does it take for someone who doesn't know English to speak like a native?] Speaker B: फक्त तीन आठवडे. [Just three weeks.] Speaker A: कसं? [How?] Speaker B: With MySivi, of course. बघा कसं. [With MySivi, of course. See how.] Speaker C: तुमचं नाव काय? [What is your name?] Speaker B: My name is Akshay. Speaker C: तुमचं वय काय? [What is your age?] Speaker B: I have 39. Speaker C: तुम्हाला हे म्हणायचं होतं का? I'm 39. [Did you mean to say this? I'm 39.] Speaker B: Oh yeah, right, I'm 39. Speaker C: Where are you from? Speaker B: I am Mumbai. Speaker C: छान प्रयत्न पण तुला म्हणायला हवं, I am from Mumbai. [Good attempt, but you should say, I am from Mumbai.] Speaker B: I'm sorry, I make mistakes. Speaker C: काळजी करू नका, मी १ कोटी लोकांना MySivi वर English शिकवलं आहे. पण रोज बोलत राहिलो तर आपण दोघं मिळून अजून चांगलं करू. [Don't worry, I have taught English to 1 crore people on MySivi. But if we keep speaking daily, we both can do even better together.] Speaker B: Trial फक्त १ रुपयाचा आहे. Try तरी करा. [The trial is only for 1 rupee. At least try it.]

With MySivi course बघा कसं [How long does it take for someone who doesn't know English to speak like a native? Just three weeks. How? With MySivi course, see how] तुमचं नाव काय [What is your name] My name is Akshay तुमचं वय काय [What is your age] I have 39 तुम्हाला हे म्हणायचं होतं का [Did you mean to say this] I'm 39 Oh yeah right I'm 39 Where are you from I am Mumbai छान प्रयत्न पण तुला म्हणायला हवं [Good attempt but you should say] I am from Mumbai I'm sorry I make mistakes काळजी करू नका मी १ कोटी लोकांना MySivi वर English शिकवलं आहे पण रोज बोलत राहिलो तर आपण दोघं मिळून अजून चांगलं करू [Don't worry, I have taught English to 1 crore people on MySivi, but if we keep speaking daily, we both can do even better together] Start English Learning - MySivi 10M+ Downloads Trial फक्त १ रुपयाचा आहे try तरी करा [Trial is only for 1 rupee, at least try it]
summary: A Marathi ad featuring a talk-show host and guest discussing how to learn English in three weeks using the MySivi app. The guest demonstrates a live interaction with the app's AI avatar, which corrects his grammatical mistakes. The ad concludes with a call to action highlighting a 1-rupee trial offer.
